mission.title: gitea: Add Package Registry
mission.description:
This PR adds support for multiple package registries.

Currently implemented are 
- [Composer](https://getcomposer.org/)
- [Conan](https://conan.io/)
- Container ([Docker](https://www.docker.com/) / [Helm](https://helm.sh/))
- Generic packages
- [Maven](https://maven.apache.org)
- [npm](https://www.npmjs.com/)
- [NuGet](https://www.nuget.org/)
- [PyPI](https://pypi.org/)
- [RubyGems](https://guides.rubygems.org/)

Every user/org has an own package registry for all different types of packages.

<

resolution.summary:
publish npm package seems return failure.

```
$ more .npmrc
registry=http://localhost:3000/api/v1/repos/lunny/11112/packages/npm/
_authToken=8ddfb644064cd886323xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx
```


@lunny Why do we need that? How (where) would it look like?
filter option on search box haven't been selected.
publish npm package seems return failure.

> publish npm package seems return failure.

That's a strange behaviour. If `author` is set in your `project.json` the request contains a `"author":{"name":"..."}` object. But if `author` is not set the request contains `"author":""`. In the first case it's an object and in the second a string. Now the json parser is complaining.
I added support for RubyGems. Push, install and delete are supported.

![grafik](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/1666336/130512383-6aa09fd7-daf6-4ede-b545-1ea7348a3522.png)

1. if nothing is found on the search. --> a "no packages matching" message
  ![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/60048565/132127099-43b5019b-a75f-45ed-bf61-7010c66f0712.png)

1. if no package is published and the current logged in user has permissions to publish --> show for each registry a little quick start and the link to the docs like an empty repo shows me how to setup and push commits 
  ![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/60048565/132127122-6a8ca0fc-5d6f-4d6a-9b91-a65fd16795ff.png)
  ![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/60048565/132127161-50feb6cd-5528-4ba4-898b-aea1adc2c7d0.png)

1. a bit more spacing between the insallation instructions 
  ![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/60048565/132127060-64a5131c-cd42-447b-bd04-ba473cf39d76.png) 

1. make the dependencies name links to the dependecies page 
  ![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/60048565/132137821-26144c8a-e54f-47ee-b903-4bd006db11e0.png)

1. add a download counter like npmjs.com have it.
  ![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/60048565/132137876-372888e8-227e-4d92-8a1b-ec9f674993a7.png)

1. maybe a size and total files counter would also be an option.
  ![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/60048565/132137912-c72fed0a-edb7-43bc-91a3-8c690f0482d7.png)

1. why does the generic package dont show the README.md and dont allow to upload multiple assets?

1. `devDependencies` and `peerDependencies` defined in the `package.json` dont show in the Dependencies section ![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/60048565/132138629-c2669c86-6c4a-4bf7-a09b-59c79f87fb71.png)
